Manages the reactor multiblock and simulation. Right-click to see status.
block.unnamednuclear.reactor_casing.desc: Used to enclose the reactor. Must be airtight.
block.unnamednuclear.fuel_channel.desc: Can be filled with nuclear fuel rods to generate heat and neutrons.
block.unnamednuclear.moderator.desc: Slows down fast neutrons into thermal neutrons, which are better for fission.
block.unnamednuclear.control_channel.des: Can be filled with a control rod to absorb neutrons and slow the reaction.
block.unnamednuclear.coolant_channel.des: Removes heat from the reactor simulation.
tooltip.unnamednuclear.assembly.too_larg: Reactor interior is too large (max 1000 blocks).
tooltip.unnamednuclear.assembly.not_on_s: Controller must be on the outer surface.
guidebook.unnamednuclear.page1: Welcome to Nuclear Engineering. This mod allows you to build powerful nuclear reactors. Start by mining Uranium and Fluorite ores.
guidebook.unnamednuclear.page2: Use the Isotope Centrifuge to enrich Uranium. You need Uranium Hexafluoride (Yellowcake + Fluorite) as input. High enrichment means more power but faster depletion.
guidebook.unnamednuclear.page3: Reactors consist of a casing and an interior with Fuel Channels, Moderators, and Control Rods. Use a Reactor Controller on the surface to monitor it.
guidebook.unnamednuclear.page4: Breeding: Fast neutrons can turn U-238 into Pu-239. Reprocessing: Spent fuel rods with high waste can be put back into the centrifuge to extract Plutonium and unused Uranium.
